name: CONN SYNDROME
definition: PRIMARY HYPERALDOSTERONISM = PRIMARY ALDOSTERONISM autonomous excess secretion of the mineralocorticoid aldosterone with hypertension + idiopathic hyperaldosteronism = focal / diffuse hyperplasia of glomerulosa zone
discriminating_features: mass of soft-tissue density / low attenuation
both glands normal in size ← micronodules

general: mass of soft-tissue density / low attenuation
both glands normal in size ← micronodules
NUC: bilateral early visualization (< 5 days) implies adrenal hyperplasia
late bilateral visualization (> 5 days) may be normal

clinical.Rx: adrenalectomy for neoplasms (75% long-term cure rate for hypertension); medical
